presets.name: White Background
presets.layout: single product centered on clean white or near-white background, no text, no props, realistic shadow

presets.name: Lifestyle Scene
presets.layout: product dominant in a believable use scene with restrained props and clear foreground focus

presets.name: Premium Studio
presets.layout: studio-lit product beauty shot with controlled shadow, macro detail, and premium material emphasis

presets.name: Comparison Layout
presets.layout: organized multi-angle or SKU comparison with concise labels and clear product hierarchy

presets.name: Social Cover
presets.layout: mobile-first cover image with product dominant, concise headline, lifestyle cue, and clean negative space
